issues.title: EsVectorStore Search NoSuchMethodError
issues.body:
java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'co.elastic.clients.elasticsearch._types.KnnSearch$Builder co.elastic.clients.elasticsearch._types.KnnSearch$Builder.k(java.lang.Integer)'

I'm using spring boot 3.3.10 and elasticsearch 8.13.4 and still have this issue

comments.body: It only passed with spring boot 3.4.7

This issue seems to be related to https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2220

Could you try excluding the `elasticsearch-java` library currently used in Spring Boot and adding a version of `elasticsearch-java` that suits your needs?
